rows.src_en: List of Bing Locations for SERP. Returns the list of supported locations for Bing SERP. Your account is not charged for using this endpoint.
rows.desc_en: List the locations supported for Bing SERP requests; use a returned code or name to geo-target tasks. This endpoint is free.
rows.title_zh: 列出 Bing SERP 请求支持的地区；用返回的代码或名称对任务做地域定位。该接口免费。

rows.src_en: The current version of the API
rows.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
rows.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

rows.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
rows.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
rows.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

rows.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

rows.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

rows.src_en: The number of tasks in the tasks array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.src_en: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error
rows.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

rows.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

rows.desc_en: List of locations supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `location_code` (or `location_name`) when posting tasks to target that locale.
rows.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的地区列表。提交任务时用其中的 `location_code`（或 `location_name`）来锁定目标地区。

rows.desc_en: Numeric code identifying the location; pass it as the `location_code` request field to geo-target a task.
rows.title_zh: 标识地区的数字代码；作为请求字段 `location_code` 传入以对任务做地域定位。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the location; corresponds to the `location_name` request field.
rows.title_zh: 地区的可读全名；对应请求字段 `location_name`。

rows.desc_en: Code of the enclosing (parent) location, e.g. the country a city belongs to; helps build a location hierarchy.
rows.title_zh: 上级（父）地区的代码，例如城市所属的国家，可用于构建地区层级。

rows.desc_en: ISO 3166-1 country code of the location, e.g. `US`.
rows.title_zh: 该地区所属国家的 ISO 3166-1 代码，如 `US`。

rows.src_en: List of Bing Languages for SERP. Returns the list of supported languages for Bing SERP. Your account is not charged for using this endpoint.
rows.desc_en: List the languages supported for Bing SERP requests; use a returned code or name when posting tasks. This endpoint is free.
rows.title_zh: 列出 Bing SERP 请求支持的语言；提交任务时使用返回的代码或名称。该接口免费。

rows.src_en: Setting Bing Organic SERP Tasks. Your account is charged only for setting a task. You can send up to 100 tasks per POST call and retrieve completed results later by task id or via postback/pingback.
rows.desc_en: Queue an organic SERP task for Bing; you are charged only for posting, can send up to 100 tasks per call, and collect results later by task id or via postback/pingback.
rows.title_zh: 提交 Bing 自然搜索 SERP 任务；仅在提交时计费，每次调用最多 100 个任务，稍后按任务 id 或通过 postback/pingback 领取结果。

rows.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
rows.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine location
rows.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine language
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
rows.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

rows.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
rows.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

rows.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
rows.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
rows.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

rows.src_en: Notification URL of a completed task
rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

rows.src_en: Postback datatype; possible values: regular, advanced, html
rows.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
rows.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

rows.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
rows.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
rows.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

rows.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

rows.src_en: Number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.title_zh: 按任务 id 领取此前提交的 Bing 任务的 regular 结果。

rows.src_en: Live YouTube Video Info Advanced. Returns detailed information about a YouTube video in real time. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.
rows.desc_en: Return detailed YouTube video metadata synchronously in one call; each Live call carries exactly one task.
rows.title_zh: 在一次调用中同步返回 YouTube 视频的详细元数据；每个 Live 调用仅含一个任务。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the target YouTube video (the `v` value in a watch URL). Required to fetch info, organic, subtitle, or comment data for that video.
rows.title_zh: 目标 YouTube 视频的标识（观看链接中的 `v` 值）。获取该视频的信息、自然结果、字幕或评论时必填。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine location
rows.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine language
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.

rows.title_zh: 提交任务以按关键词获取 YouTube 自然搜索结果；仅在提交时计费，稍后按任务 id 领取结果。

rows.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
rows.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
rows.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

rows.src_en: Notification URL of a completed task
rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

rows.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

rows.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

rows.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
rows.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

rows.src_en: Live YouTube Organic Advanced. Returns YouTube Organic search results in real time. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.
rows.desc_en: Return YouTube organic search results synchronously in one call; each Live call carries exactly one task.
rows.title_zh: 在一次调用中同步返回 YouTube 自然搜索结果；每个 Live 调用仅含一个任务。

rows.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
rows.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine location
rows.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine language
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

rows.src_en: The current version of the API
rows.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
rows.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

rows.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
rows.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
rows.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

rows.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

rows.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

rows.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

rows.desc_en: The SERP payload generated in real time for this Live request. Its inner shape depends on the result type and search engine, so it is returned as an open array.
rows.title_zh: 本次 Live 请求实时生成的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回。

rows.src_en: Setting YouTube Subtitles Tasks. Returns subtitles for a specified YouTube video. Your account is charged only for setting a task.
rows.desc_en: Queue a task to retrieve subtitles for a YouTube video; you are charged only for posting and collect results later by task id.
rows.title_zh: 提交任务以获取某 YouTube 视频的字幕；仅在提交时计费，稍后按任务 id 领取结果。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the target YouTube video (the `v` value in a watch URL). Required to fetch info, organic, subtitle, or comment data for that video.
rows.title_zh: 目标 YouTube 视频的标识（观看链接中的 `v` 值）。获取该视频的信息、自然结果、字幕或评论时必填。

rows.desc_en: Language code of the subtitle track to retrieve for the video.
rows.title_zh: 要获取的视频字幕轨道的语言代码。

rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
rows.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

rows.src_en: Notification URL of a completed task
rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

rows.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`. Only the advanced result type is available for this endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；本接口仅提供 advanced 结果类型。

rows.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.

rows.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.

rows.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.

rows.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

rows.desc_en: List of completed-but-uncollected tasks. Each entry exposes the URLs to fetch its results.
rows.title_zh: 已完成但尚未领取的任务列表；每个条目给出领取结果的 URL。

rows.src_en: Task identifier of the completed task
rows.desc_en: UUID of a completed task ready for collection; feed it to the matching `task_get` endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 可领取的已完成任务的 UUID；传给对应的 `task_get` 接口。

rows.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's advanced results.
rows.title_zh: 领取该任务 advanced 结果的相对 API 路径。

rows.src_en: Get YouTube Comments Results by id. Returns comment results for a previously posted task.
rows.desc_en: Collect the advanced results of a previously posted YouTube task by its id.
rows.title_zh: 按任务 id 领取此前提交的 YouTube 任务的 advanced 结果。

rows.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

rows.src_en: Live YouTube Comments Advanced. Returns YouTube comment data in real time. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.
rows.desc_en: Return YouTube video comments synchronously in one call; each Live call carries exactly one task.
rows.title_zh: 在一次调用中同步返回 YouTube 视频评论；每个 Live 调用仅含一个任务。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the target YouTube video (the `v` value in a watch URL). Required to fetch info, organic, subtitle, or comment data for that video.
rows.title_zh: 目标 YouTube 视频的标识（观看链接中的 `v` 值）。获取该视频的信息、自然结果、字幕或评论时必填。

rows.title_zh: 该搜索引擎 SERP 支持的地区列表。提交任务时用其中的 `location_code`（或 `location_name`）来锁定目标地区。

rows.desc_en: Numeric code identifying the location; pass it as the `location_code` request field to geo-target a task.
rows.title_zh: 标识地区的数字代码；作为请求字段 `location_code` 传入以对任务做地域定位。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the location; corresponds to the `location_name` request field.
rows.title_zh: 地区的可读全名；对应请求字段 `location_name`。

rows.desc_en: Code of the enclosing (parent) location, e.g. the country a city belongs to; helps build a location hierarchy.
rows.title_zh: 上级（父）地区的代码，例如城市所属的国家，可用于构建地区层级。

rows.desc_en: ISO 3166-1 country code of the location, e.g. `US`.
rows.title_zh: 该地区所属国家的 ISO 3166-1 代码，如 `US`。

rows.src_en: List of Baidu Languages for SERP. Returns the list of supported languages for Baidu SERP. Your account is not charged for using this endpoint.

rows.title_zh: 列出 百度 SERP 请求支持的语言；提交任务时使用返回的代码或名称。该接口免费。

rows.desc_en: Code identifying the language; pass it as the `language_code` request field.
rows.title_zh: 标识语言的代码；作为请求字段 `language_code` 传入。

rows.src_en: Setting Baidu Organic SERP Tasks. Your account is charged only for setting a task. You can send up to 100 tasks per POST call and retrieve completed results later by task id or via postback/pingback.
rows.desc_en: Queue an organic SERP task for Baidu; you are charged only for posting, can send up to 100 tasks per call, and collect results later by task id or via postback/pingback.
rows.title_zh: 提交 百度 自然搜索 SERP 任务；仅在提交时计费，每次调用最多 100 个任务，稍后按任务 id 或通过 postback/pingback 领取结果。

rows.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
rows.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine location
rows.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine language
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
rows.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

rows.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
rows.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

rows.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
rows.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
rows.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

rows.src_en: Notification URL of a completed task
rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

rows.src_en: Postback datatype; possible values: regular, advanced, html
rows.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
rows.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

rows.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

rows.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
rows.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

rows.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

rows.src_en: Number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
rows.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

rows.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
rows.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

rows.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
rows.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
rows.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

rows.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

rows.desc_en: List the locations supported for Seznam SERP requests; use a returned code or name to geo-target tasks. This endpoint is free.
rows.title_zh: 列出 Seznam SERP 请求支持的地区；用返回的代码或名称对任务做地域定位。该接口免费。

rows.src_en: The current version of the API
rows.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
rows.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

rows.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
rows.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
rows.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

rows.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

rows.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

rows.src_en: The number of tasks in the tasks array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

rows.desc_en: List of locations supported for this search engine's SERP. Use a returned `location_code` (or `location_name`) when posting tasks to target that locale.

rows.title_zh: 标识地区的数字代码；作为请求字段 `location_code` 传入以对任务做地域定位。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable full name of the location; corresponds to the `location_name` request field.
rows.title_zh: 地区的可读全名；对应请求字段 `location_name`。

rows.desc_en: Code of the enclosing (parent) location, e.g. the country a city belongs to; helps build a location hierarchy.
rows.title_zh: 上级（父）地区的代码，例如城市所属的国家，可用于构建地区层级。

rows.desc_en: ISO 3166-1 country code of the location, e.g. `US`.
rows.title_zh: 该地区所属国家的 ISO 3166-1 代码，如 `US`。

rows.desc_en: Queue an organic SERP task for Seznam; you are charged only for posting, can send up to 100 tasks per call, and collect results later by task id or via postback/pingback.
rows.title_zh: 提交 Seznam 自然搜索 SERP 任务；仅在提交时计费，每次调用最多 100 个任务，稍后按任务 id 或通过 postback/pingback 领取结果。

rows.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
rows.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine location
rows.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine language
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
rows.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

rows.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
rows.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

rows.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
rows.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
rows.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

rows.src_en: Notification URL of a completed task
rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

rows.src_en: Postback datatype; possible values: regular, advanced, html
rows.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
rows.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

rows.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.

rows.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
rows.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

rows.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

rows.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

rows.src_en: The number of tasks in the tasks array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in the `tasks` array.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.src_en: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error
rows.desc_en: How many of the entries in `tasks` finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 中以错误结束的条目数量；若非 0，需逐个检查任务自身的 `status_code`。

rows.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

rows.desc_en: The collected SERP payload for the requested task. Its inner shape depends on the result type (regular / advanced / html) and the search engine, so it is returned as an open array; parse according to the endpoint you called.
rows.title_zh: 所请求任务领取到的 SERP 结果数据。其内部结构取决于结果类型（regular / advanced / html）与搜索引擎，故以开放数组返回；请按调用的接口类型解析。

rows.src_en: Setting Naver Organic SERP Tasks. Your account is charged only for setting a task. You can send up to 100 tasks per POST call and retrieve completed results later by task id or via postback/pingback.
rows.desc_en: Queue an organic SERP task for Naver; you are charged only for posting, can send up to 100 tasks per call, and collect results later by task id or via postback/pingback.
rows.title_zh: 提交 Naver 自然搜索 SERP 任务；仅在提交时计费，每次调用最多 100 个任务，稍后按任务 id 或通过 postback/pingback 领取结果。

rows.desc_en: Search query to run on the search engine, exactly as a user would type it. This is the only required field for keyword-based endpoints.
rows.title_zh: 要在搜索引擎上执行的查询词，按用户实际输入的样子填写；关键词类接口中这是唯一必填字段。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine location
rows.desc_en: Full location name to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_code`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的地区全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Numeric location code to geo-target the search; obtain valid values from the engine's locations endpoint. Provide either this or `location_name`.
rows.title_zh: 用于地域定位搜索的数字地区代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 locations 接口。与 `location_name` 二选一提供。

rows.src_en: Full name of search engine language
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_code`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言全名；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_code` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Language code for the search; obtain valid values from the engine's languages endpoint. Provide either this or `language_name`.
rows.title_zh: 搜索使用的语言代码；有效取值见对应引擎的 languages 接口。与 `language_name` 二选一提供。

rows.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, which can change how results are ranked and rendered.
rows.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，会影响结果的排序与呈现方式。

rows.desc_en: Operating system to emulate together with `device`.
rows.title_zh: 与 `device` 搭配模拟的操作系统。

rows.desc_en: How many SERP results to parse; higher values return more results and may affect task cost.
rows.title_zh: 解析的 SERP 结果条数；值越大返回结果越多，并可能影响任务费用。

rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the queued task; a higher priority makes the task run sooner and may cost more.
rows.title_zh: 排队任务的执行优先级；优先级越高任务越早执行，费用可能更高。

rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the task result once it is ready, so you do not have to poll.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后由 DataForSEO 主动回推结果的你方接收地址，从而无需轮询。

rows.src_en: Notification URL of a completed task
rows.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify that the task is complete (without the payload); you then collect results via `task_get`.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时由 DataForSEO 回调通知（不含结果数据）的你方地址；收到通知后再用 `task_get` 领取结果。

rows.src_en: Postback datatype; possible values: regular, advanced, html
rows.desc_en: Result format to deliver to `postback_url`; choose the result type that matches how you will consume the data.
rows.title_zh: 回推到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；选择与你消费方式相匹配的结果类型。

rows.src_en: The current version of the API
rows.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
rows.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

rows.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
rows.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

rows.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
rows.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
rows.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

rows.desc_en: Amount charged for this individual task, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 该单任务的扣费金额，单位为美元。

rows.src_en: Number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.src_en: Get Organic SERP Completed Tasks. Returns completed Naver Organic SERP tasks that have not been collected yet.
rows.desc_en: List Naver tasks that have finished but have not yet been collected, with the URLs to fetch each result.
rows.title_zh: 列出 Naver 已完成但尚未领取的任务，并给出领取各结果的 URL。

rows.title_zh: 可领取的已完成任务的 UUID；传给对应的 `task_get` 接口。

rows.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's regular results.

rows.title_zh: 领取该任务 advanced 结果的相对 API 路径。

rows.desc_en: Relative API path for collecting this task's HTML results.

rows.src_en: Get Naver Organic SERP Results by id (regular). Returns regular SERP results for a previously posted Naver Organic task.
rows.desc_en: Collect the regular results of a previously posted Naver task by its id.
rows.title_zh: 按任务 id 领取此前提交的 Naver 任务的 regular 结果。

rows.desc_en: UUID of the task to collect, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted or listed by the matching tasks_ready endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 要领取的任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，或可从对应 tasks_ready 接口列出。

rows.src_en: The Live SERP API AI Summary endpoint provides a summary of the content found on any SERP and generates a response based on the user prompt. Your account is charged for each request.
rows.desc_en: Generate an AI summary of the content found on a previously fetched SERP, answering an optional prompt. Charged per request.
rows.title_zh: 对此前抓取的某个 SERP 内容生成 AI 摘要，并可按可选 prompt 作答。按次计费。

rows.src_en: Unique identifier of the associated task in UUID format; can be used within 30 days
rows.desc_en: UUID of an existing SERP task whose content the summary is built from; returned as `tasks[].id` when you posted the task and valid for 30 days.
rows.title_zh: 用于生成摘要的已有 SERP 任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，有效期 30 天。

rows.desc_en: Extra instruction steering how the AI summarizes the SERP content.
rows.title_zh: 用于引导 AI 如何总结 SERP 内容的附加指令。

rows.src_en: Whether to consider extra SERP features such as answer_box, knowledge_graph, and featured_snippet; default true
rows.desc_en: When enabled, the summary also takes extra SERP features (such as `answer_box`, `knowledge_graph`, and `featured_snippet`) into account.
rows.title_zh: 开启后，摘要会同时纳入额外的 SERP 特性（如 `answer_box`、`knowledge_graph`、`featured_snippet`）。

rows.src_en: Whether to fetch content from pages in SERPs; default false
rows.desc_en: When enabled, the page content behind the SERP results is fetched and fed into the summary for richer answers.
rows.title_zh: 开启后，会抓取 SERP 结果背后的页面内容并纳入摘要，以获得更充实的回答。

rows.src_en: Whether to include source links in the summary; default false
rows.desc_en: When enabled, the summary cites the source links it drew from.
rows.title_zh: 开启后，摘要会附带其引用的来源链接。

rows.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

rows.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

rows.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

rows.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
rows.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

rows.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
rows.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
rows.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

rows.src_en: Number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

rows.src_en: Contains the same parameters specified in the POST request
rows.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the POST request, useful for correlating the response with its input.
rows.title_zh: 回显 POST 请求中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

rows.desc_en: Array holding the AI summary output for the request.
rows.title_zh: 承载本次请求 AI 摘要输出的数组。

rows.src_en: Number of items in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in the `items` array.
rows.title_zh: `items` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.desc_en: Array of generated summary items.
rows.title_zh: 生成的摘要条目数组。

rows.desc_en: The AI-generated summary text answering the prompt against the SERP content.
rows.title_zh: 针对 SERP 内容并结合 prompt 生成的 AI 摘要文本。

rows.src_en: Using the Live Page Screenshot endpoint, you can capture a screenshot of any SERP page. The screenshot is made by visualizing the HTML of the search engine page. Your account is charged for each request.
rows.desc_en: Capture a screenshot of a previously fetched SERP page by rendering its HTML. Charged per request.
rows.title_zh: 通过渲染此前抓取的某个 SERP 页面的 HTML 来截取页面截图。按次计费。

rows.src_en: Unique identifier of the associated task in UUID format; can be used within 7 days
rows.desc_en: UUID of an existing SERP task whose page is screenshotted; returned as `tasks[].id` when you posted the task and valid for 7 days.
rows.title_zh: 用于截图的已有 SERP 任务的 UUID；提交任务时由 `tasks[].id` 返回，有效期 7 天。

rows.src_en: Browser resolution preset: desktop, tablet, or mobile
rows.desc_en: Predefined viewport profile (desktop, tablet, or mobile) controlling the rendered screen size.
rows.title_zh: 预设视口配置（desktop、tablet 或 mobile），决定渲染的屏幕尺寸。

rows.desc_en: Custom viewport width in pixels, overriding the preset; valid range 240-9999.
rows.title_zh: 自定义视口宽度（像素），覆盖预设；有效范围 240-9999。

rows.desc_en: Custom viewport height in pixels, overriding the preset; valid range 240-9999.
rows.title_zh: 自定义视口高度（像素），覆盖预设；有效范围 240-9999。

rows.desc_en: Device pixel ratio applied when rendering, controlling screenshot sharpness; valid range 0.5-3.
rows.title_zh: 渲染时应用的设备像素比，控制截图清晰度；有效范围 0.5-3。

rows.src_en: SERP page number to screenshot; default 1
rows.desc_en: Which SERP page to capture (1 is the first results page).
rows.title_zh: 要截取的 SERP 页码（1 为第一页结果）。

rows.src_en: The current version of the API
rows.desc_en: API version that produced this response, useful when reporting issues or pinning behavior across releases.
rows.title_zh: 生成该响应的 API 版本，便于上报问题或在版本迭代中锁定行为。

rows.desc_en: Top-level status code for the whole API call. `20000` indicates the call was accepted and processed; non-20xxx values signal a request-level failure that applies before any per-task processing.
rows.title_zh: 整次 API 调用的总状态码。`20000` 表示调用被受理并处理成功；非 20xxx 值代表在进入单任务处理之前就发生的请求级失败。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying `status_code`; read it when `status_code` is not a success value to learn the cause.
rows.title_zh: 与 `status_code` 配套的可读说明；当 `status_code` 非成功值时，读取此字段定位原因。

rows.desc_en: Server-side execution time for the whole call, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 整次调用的服务端执行耗时，单位为秒。

rows.desc_en: Total amount charged for this call across all tasks, in USD. Reads-only listing endpoints (locations/languages) return 0.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用所有任务合计扣费，单位为美元；locations/languages 等只读列表接口返回 0。

rows.desc_en: Container for the individual task results of this call. Because the gateway sends one task per call, expect a single entry.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用各任务结果的容器；由于网关每次仅提交一个任务，通常只含一个条目。

rows.desc_en: UUID of this task. Pass it to the matching `task_get` endpoint to collect results later, and reuse it as `task_id` for the AI Summary and Screenshot endpoints.
rows.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID。稍后用它调用对应的 `task_get` 接口取回结果，也可作为 `task_id` 复用于 AI Summary 与 Screenshot 接口。

rows.desc_en: Per-task status code. `20000` means done; `20100` typically means the task was accepted and is still being processed.
rows.title_zh: 单任务状态码。`20000` 表示已完成；`20100` 通常表示任务已受理、仍在处理中。

rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status; consult it when the task code is not a success value.
rows.title_zh: 该任务状态的可读说明；当任务状态码非成功值时据此排查。

rows.src_en: Number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.desc_en: API path segments that were called, echoing how the request was routed.
rows.title_zh: 本次调用的 API 路径分段，回显请求的路由方式。

rows.src_en: Contains the same parameters specified in the POST request
rows.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied in the POST request, useful for correlating the response with its input.
rows.title_zh: 回显 POST 请求中提交的参数，便于将响应与其输入对应。

rows.desc_en: Array holding the screenshot output for the request.
rows.title_zh: 承载本次请求截图输出的数组。

rows.src_en: Number of items in the results array
rows.desc_en: Number of entries in the `items` array.
rows.title_zh: `items` 数组中的条目数量。

rows.desc_en: Array of screenshot items.
rows.title_zh: 截图条目数组。

rows.src_en: URL of the page screenshot on DataForSEO storage
rows.desc_en: URL of the captured SERP page screenshot hosted on DataForSEO storage.
rows.title_zh: 截取的 SERP 页面截图地址，托管于 DataForSEO 存储。
